name: @coiggahou2002/dagdo
description: Dependency-aware todo manager — tasks as a DAG, topological sort tells you what to do next

scripts.build:web: cd web && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
scripts.build:node: bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --outfile dist/cli.js --external mermaid-isomorphic --external playwright --external @hpcc-js/wasm-graphviz --external @resvg/resvg-js
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run typecheck
